title: UC Davis - ß Hydroxy Butyrate Protocol
author: Peter Havel
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ywafxae

steps.instruction: Reconstitute R1 and R2 using the buffers provided.
Add 4 µl of calibrator and sample to each well.
Add 270 µl of R1 to each well. Incubate at 37°C for 5 minutes.
Add 90 µl of R2 to each well. Incubate at 37°C for 2 minutes. Read at 405 nm. Then continue reading every 30 seconds for 2 minutes.
Calculate the slope of the reaction for each well. The assay will be linear so the unknown samples can be calculated as (Sample ΔOD/min ÷ Calibrator ΔOD/min) × Calibrator Concentration.
